clue_fairness.value: Historical documents and certificates presented directly to reader as evidence
clue_fairness.quote: This manuscript, on which was fixed the last gaze of the Queen of Scotland, is a duodecimo, written in the Gothic

social_world.value: Scottish nobility and regency power structure - lords forcing royal abdication through intimidation
social_world.quote: take care, for our patience is at an end, and we could easily end by breaking what would not bend.

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence of coercion - violet marks on arm from steel gauntlet prove forced abdication
reveal_mechanic.quote: raising her sleeve and showing the violet marks made on her arm by Lord Lindsay's steel gauntlet

media_and_audience.value: Historical narrative framing royal misfortune as predetermined fate - 'unlucky name' mythology
media_and_audience.quote: Some royal names are predestined to misfortune: in France, there is the name "Henry"

_meta.title: ebook alexandre dumas pere mary stuart
